# Checkbox
<!-- nib-component: v1 | generated: 2026-03-02 | do not edit manually -->

> A binary toggle that can be checked or unchecked

**Widget type:** `checkbox`
**WAI-ARIA APG:** [checkbox pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/checkbox/)

---

## Anatomy

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `root` | The outer wrapper element |
| `control` | The visual checkbox indicator |
| `label` | The visible text label |
| `checkmark` | The check icon shown when checked |

---

## States

| State | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `default` | Unchecked resting state |
| `checked` | Value is selected |
| `indeterminate` | Mixed selection — neither fully checked nor unchecked |
| `focused` | Keyboard or programmatic focus (focus ring) |
| `disabled` | Not interactive (aria-disabled) |
| `checked-disabled` | Checked and non-interactive (aria-disabled) |

---

## Variants

- `default` — Standard checkbox with label
- `indeterminate` — Partially checked state (mixed selection)
## Accessibility

**ARIA role:** `checkbox`
**Focus behavior:** receives-focus
**Focus trap:** No
**Required label:** Yes (visible-label-or-aria-labelledby)
**Touch target minimum:** 44pt iOS / 48dp Android / 24px web

### Keyboard Interaction

| Key | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| `Space` | Toggles the checked state |
| `Tab` | Move focus to the checkbox |
| `Shift+Tab` | Move focus away from the checkbox |

### ARIA Attributes

- `aria-checked`
- `aria-label`
- `aria-labelledby`
- `aria-disabled`

---

## Token Bindings

```json
{
  "control": {
    "default": {
      "background": "checkbox.bg",
      "border-color": "checkbox.border",
      "border-radius": "checkbox.radius"
    },
    "checked": {
      "background": "checkbox.bg.checked",
      "border-color": "checkbox.border.checked"
    },
    "focused": {
      "outline-color": "color.focus.ring",
      "outline-width": "2px"
    },
    "disabled": {
      "background": "color.surface.disabled",
      "border-color": "color.border.disabled"
    }
  }
}
```
